title: clicksouls
description: a plugin good for treasure hunt and Parkour and it works similar to Fairy Souls plugin from hypixal
body:
# Plugin Information

a plugin good for treasure hunt and Parkour and it works similar to Fairy Souls plugin from hypixal

**Note:** The future development and maintenance of this plugin depend on its popularity and usefulness, as there may be other alternative plugins available.

## Features

- Easy-to-use
- redemption by right-clicking.
- Flexibility to use any block
- Display information through messages and titles.
- Support for world
- hex colour support in full plugin
- runs command on every soul and after get all

## Installation

1. Download the plugin.
2. Place the downloaded files into the 'plugins' folder of your Minecraft server.
3. Restart the server to load the plugin.
4. Grant the necessary permissions to players as desired.  

## Commands

- `/clicksouls give <id>`  
- `/cs create <id>`
- `/cs reset <id> <name>`
- `/cs reload`
- `/cs delete <id>`
## Permission

- cs.admin
- cs.player
## Placeholders
- %clicksouls_collect_(id)%
## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q. Can player break it?**    
A: yes, this plugin doesn't touch it as Worldguard does it better  
 
**Q. how to get those blocks?**    
A: this plugin gives freedom to use any block so you can use any block or any player head plugin
in video skulls plugin was used you can also use block Particle plugin.  
## Donators

Currently, there are no donators. 😢

## Disclaimer

Your feedback and suggestions for improvements are always welcome.   
If you encounter any issues, please use the discussion section of the plugin or contact us via Discord.


## Donators

- MCbasement - $50
